custom_fields.description: Displayed only on Sales Order form.
custom_fields.label: Order Requests
custom_fields.name: Customer-order_requests

custom_fields.description: Accuracy of data (shipping, billing, tax, currency, customer group) has been verified by Sales Admin. This is required to confirm Sales Orders.
custom_fields.label: Verified by Sales Admin
custom_fields.name: Customer-verified

custom_fields.description: Displayed on "Commande à Traiter" print view, and Delivery Note form.
custom_fields.label: Delivery Requests
custom_fields.name: Customer-delivery_requests

custom_fields.description: Enables cartridge management in customer portal
custom_fields.label: Enable Cartridge Portal
custom_fields.name: Customer-enable_cartridge_portal

custom_fields.description: Can customer order refills for cartridges that are not stored at bNovate?
custom_fields.label: Allow Ordering Unstored Cartridges
custom_fields.name: Customer-allow_unstored_cartridges

custom_fields.description: If set, users at this customer can only use this billing address.
custom_fields.label: Portal Billing Address
custom_fields.name: Customer-portal_billing_address

custom_fields.description: If checked, bNovate organises the return shipping and import of cartridges for refills.
custom_fields.label: Organize Return
custom_fields.name: Customer-organize_return

custom_fields.description: Default discount applied on the default list, is applied to each line item of QTN and SO.
custom_fields.label: Default Discount (%)
custom_fields.name: Customer-default_discount

custom_fields.description: Users from this company can submit service reports.
custom_fields.label: Is Service Partner
custom_fields.name: Customer-is_service_partner
